ddls:
CREATE TABLE "business_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the business account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the business account */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the business account is located */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the business account */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the business account was added to the system */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the business account */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the business operates */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the business */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the business */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, potential lead) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the account information was last updated */,
  "assigned_team" TEXT /* Team or department to which the account is assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "rep_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the sales representative belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the sales representative */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales representative was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the sales representative */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the representative's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_rep_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business account assigned */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, potential lead) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment ended (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_rep_assignments_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_rep_assignments_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES business_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction log */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business account involved in the interaction */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction took place */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, meeting) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the interaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction (in minutes) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when a follow-up is scheduled */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the interaction (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES business_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("rep_id")
)
